title: ranunculus auricomus var. cassubicus
intro: Ranunculus auricomus var. cassubicus, also known as the Yellow-flowered Buttercup, is a plant species within the Ranunculus genus. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits associated with Ranunculus auricomus var. cassubicus include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as having antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically to treat skin issues or taken internally to support overall health.
